description: As an agricultural climatologist at the USDA Global Climate Assessment Unit, document Sahel precipitation teleconnection patterns for an international food security report. Use Panoply and the climate datasets in ~/PanoplyData/ to characterize the Sahel-ENSO teleconnection and identify the SST patterns associated with enhanced versus suppressed Sahel rainfall, following the analysis mandate at ~/Desktop/sahel_drought_mandate.txt.

metadata.industry: USDA Economic Research Service / Global Food Security
